creator: ksraman.91@gmail.com
text:
The print/a2ps port is not reproducible. As part of reproducible-builds effort, the port should be reproducible and should not depend on build environment. The README template file has @date@ which depends on current system date and makes the build not reproducible. Please see the below url to know more about reproducible-builds project.
https://reproducible-builds.org/
